payload.answer: I didn’t save that. Please rewrite it with the person’s name and what “the other one” refers to.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed memory uses unresolved references: "He" does not identify a person, and "the other one" does not identify the preferred item. The user chose Rewrite memory, so no durable memory should be committed.

details: Rewrite requested because the subject and object are ambiguous.

repair_options: Rewrite with the person’s name, e.g. “Alex prefers the blue version.”
Rewrite with the exact item being preferred, e.g. “Jordan prefers Notion over Google Docs.”
